---
title: "The Hon. Elizabeth Colborne"
---

## The Hon. Elizabeth Colborne

**Dates:** (1819-14 June 1882)

### Description

cousin of CMY

### Biography

Eldest daughter of the 1st Lord Seaton. [PB 1914;  tombstone Holy Cross, Newton Ferrars; 1871 census]

### Letters

- Letter from Feb 26th 1876
- Letter from Novr 6th 1874
- Letter from Sept 6th [1869]
- Letter from January 19, 1869
- Letter from July 30th [1863]
- Letter from July 25th [1863]
- Letter from October 3. [1857]
- Letter from October 1, 1857
- Letter from 26 Septr 1857
- Letter from April 19th  [1845[[footnote:1]]]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
